creator: mail@bastimeyer.de
text:
(In reply to takefu from comment #12)

> py-streamlink-7.2.0.patch

`versioningit` is still included in your Makefile. It is not a required build dependency if you're building from Streamlink's source-dist tarball, since 6.3.0. It is only required when building directly from git. The source-dist has the version string already baked in.
https://streamlink.github.io/changelog.html#streamlink-6-3-0-2023-10-25

`pytest-asyncio` is no longer a test dependency since 6.11.0.
https://streamlink.github.io/changelog.html#streamlink-6-11-0-2024-10-01
